summary: P21 Catalogue Gaps Testing Complete. All 17 features tested and verified. Backend APIs (30/30 pytest tests passed) and Frontend UI (all GAP-A, GAP-B, GAP-C features working correctly). Food Categories CRUD, Addons CRUD, and Ingredient Rename with warning flow all working as expected.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

critical_code_review_comments: api.js correctly implements Food Category CRUD: createFoodCategory (POST), updateFoodCategory (POST not PUT), deleteFoodCategory (DELETE)
api.js correctly implements Addon CRUD: createAddon (POST→201), updateAddon (PUT /addon-update/{id}), deleteAddon (DELETE /delete-addon/{id})
api.js correctly implements updateStockItem with stock_title field for ingredient rename
ProductCatalogue.jsx FoodCategoriesTab has Add Category button, Edit/Delete actions per row
ProductCatalogue.jsx AddonsTab has Add Addon button, Edit/Delete actions per row
IngredientCatalogue.jsx EditIngredientDialog shows editable Ingredient Name field with rename warning on name change
Rename warning correctly appears on first Save when name changed, button changes to 'Confirm Rename & Save'
Duplicate food category correctly returns 400 with error message
Duplicate addon correctly returns 409 with errors array
seed_data_creation: None - using real POS API via proxy. Test data created and cleaned up during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P21 Catalogue Gaps fully tested. All CRUD operations working: Food Categories (POST add, POST update, DELETE), Addons (POST add→201, PUT addon-update, DELETE delete-addon), Ingredient rename (PUT update-stock with stock_title). Rename warning flow working correctly - appears on first Save when name changed, second Save confirms. Duplicate validation working (400 for food cat, 409 for addon). Test data cleaned up.

features_tested.GAP-A1: PASS - Food Categories tab shows Add Category button, Edit and Delete actions per row (3 edit, 3 delete buttons found)
features_tested.GAP-A2: PASS - Creating food category via POST /product/add-categories works (returns category_id)
features_tested.GAP-A3: PASS - Editing food category via POST /product/update-categories/{id} works (POST not PUT)
features_tested.GAP-A4: PASS - Deleting food category via DELETE /product/delete-categories/{id} works with confirmation dialog
features_tested.GAP-A5: PASS - Duplicate food category name returns 400 with error message
features_tested.GAP-B1: PASS - Addons tab shows Add Addon button, Edit and Delete actions per row (1 edit, 1 delete button found)
features_tested.GAP-B2: PASS - Creating addon via POST /product/add-addon returns 201
features_tested.GAP-B3: PASS - Editing addon via PUT /product/addon-update/{id} works (noun-verb route)
features_tested.GAP-B4: PASS - Deleting addon via DELETE /product/delete-addon/{id} works with confirmation dialog
features_tested.GAP-B5: PASS - Duplicate addon name returns 409 with errors array
features_tested.GAP-C1: PASS - Edit Ingredient dialog shows editable 'Ingredient Name' field (stock_title)
features_tested.GAP-C2: PASS - Changing ingredient name shows amber rename warning on first Save click
features_tested.GAP-C3: PASS - Second Save click confirms rename via PUT /inventory/update-stock/{id} with stock_title
features_tested.GAP-C4: PASS - Saving without changing name does NOT show rename warning
features_tested.REGRESSION-1: PASS - Recipes page loads correctly (2 recipes: aloo parantha, mutton keema)
features_tested.REGRESSION-2: PASS - Addon Recipes page loads correctly (1 addon recipe: rossa)
features_tested.REGRESSION-3: PASS - Operations Hub works for master user (3 Pending Approvals, 4 Stock Items)
